channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: California Wildfire Threatens Former Santa Susana Nuclear and Rocket Testing Site as Crews Work to Contain Spread
item.description: Firefighters in Southern California are battling a fast-moving wildfire that has raised serious concerns due to its proximity to the Santa Susana Field Laboratory, a former nuclear reactor and rocket ...

item.title: James Carville Warns of Increasing Corruption Allegations Against Trump
item.description: Democratic political strategist James Carville has cautioned that the public will likely see a growing number of stories detailing corruption associated with former President Donald Trump. Speaking on...

item.description: Fox News host Jesse Watters drew widespread criticism after making a series of on-air remarks about Texas Democratic Senate candidate James Talarico that many viewers and commentators described as moc...

item.title: First Kuki village in Churachandpur resettled after three years of ethnic conflict
item.description: The first Kuki village in Manipur’s Churachandpur district has been resettled after three years of displacement caused by ethnic violence, though the return has so far been partial. The village, Khoda...

item.title: New Zealand endorses voluntary carbon and nature markets amid credibility concerns
item.description: New Zealand’s government has announced support for voluntary carbon and nature markets, aiming to provide a 'warrant of fitness' that signals which markets can be trusted without directly regulating t...

item.title: Stephenville residents safe as Second World War-era shell is secured by Canadian Armed Forces
item.description: Residents of Stephenville, Newfoundland and Labrador, were initially advised to prepare for a potential evacuation after a Second World War-era artillery shell was discovered on a local beach and hand...

item.title: Trump Faces Significant Drop in Approval Among Young Male Voters
item.description: CNN data analyst Harry Enten highlighted a dramatic decline in President Donald Trump's favorability among men under 30, a demographic that played a crucial role in his 2024 election victory. During a...

item.title: Anthony Jennings shares appreciation for Filipino co-stars in iWant series 'Nurse The Dead'
item.description: Actor Anthony Jennings expressed how he finds comfort and support in working with his Filipino co-stars in the upcoming iWant series titled ‘Nurse The Dead’. According to the report, Jennings highligh...

item.title: Nigeria Super Eagles adopt cautious approach ahead of Unity Cup final against Jamaica in London
item.description: The Super Eagles of Nigeria are going into Saturday’s 2026 Unity Cup final against Jamaica with a lot of caution, as dem no wan take anything for granted despite their strong run so far in the tournam...

item.title: Joan Cusack returns to the red carpet for the London premiere of Toy Story 5
item.description: Joan Cusack, the acclaimed American actress, made her first red carpet appearance in 11 years at the London premiere of Toy Story 5. Now 63, Cusack looked effortlessly elegant in a white button-up shi...

item.description: This opinion piece examines the ongoing controversy surrounding President Cyril Ramaphosa’s Phala Phala farm scandal, framing it as a matter that continues to raise political and legal questions in So...

item.title: U.S. and Iran reach tentative 60-day ceasefire deal awaiting presidential approval
item.description: The United States and Iran have reportedly reached a tentative agreement to extend their current ceasefire by 60 days, while also initiating discussions on Iran’s nuclear programme. According to U.S. ...

item.title: Wildfire in Barrhead County prompts evacuation orders for Summerlea and Thunder Lake subdivisions
item.description: A wildfire burning in Barrhead County, located northwest of Edmonton, Alberta, prompted authorities to issue evacuation orders for parts of the municipality on Thursday afternoon. The fire led to a de...

item.title: Blue Bombers rest veterans and evaluate young talent in final pre-season matchup against BC Lions

item.title: Nicolas Cage credits Breaking Bad with changing his view on television roles

item.title: How Social Media Influencers Are Shaping Kenya’s Political Discourse Ahead of 2027
item.description: The article examines how political influence in Kenya has shifted from vernacular radio stations to social media influencers, bloggers, and online content creators. It draws parallels between the role...

item.title: How Infrastructure Vandalism Is Undermining Nigeria’s Power Sector and Economy
item.description: The article examines the growing problem of infrastructure vandalism in Nigeria’s electricity sector and how it is seriously affecting national development. It explains that acts such as stealing elec...

item.title: Ogun State celebrates Governor Dapo Abiodun at 66, highlighting governance achievements and development strides
item.description: The article marks the 66th birthday of Ogun State Governor, Dapo Abiodun, celebrating his leadership and contributions to the state’s development. It presents him as a resilient and visionary leader w...

item.title: Philippines and Japan begin talks on military intelligence-sharing pact (GSOMIA) amid regional tensions
item.description: The Philippines and Japan have officially announced the start of negotiations for a General Security of Military Information Agreement (GSOMIA), a key step that would allow both countries to share def...
